title: {name} lernt Fahrrad fahren
moral: Persistence and practice lead to triumph

beats.beat: Title page — {name} next to a shiny new bike with training wheels, eyes wide
Morning surprise — {parent} reveals the bike in the garden; {name} jumps with excitement
Examining the bike — touching the bell, spinning the pedals, checking the color
Putting on the helmet — {parent} helps adjust straps; {name} looks in a puddle reflection
First ride with training wheels — wobbly but rolling on the sidewalk in {city}
Getting confident — ringing the bell, waving at a neighbor, {companion} in the basket
{parent} suggests removing training wheels — {name} feels nervous but nods
Training wheels come off — the bike looks different, taller somehow
First attempt — {parent} holds the seat, running alongside; {name} pedals
Wobble and fall — {name} tips over onto the grass, scrapes a knee
Tears and frustration — {name} hugs {companion} and says 'I can't do it'
{parent} cleans the scrape, puts on a colorful bandage, gives encouragement
Watching older kids ride past — {name} sees them and wants to try again
Second attempt — {parent} holds on, {name} focuses, pedals harder
{parent} lets go without {name} noticing — riding alone for three seconds
{name} realizes and wobbles to a stop — 'I did it! I was riding!'
Third attempt — longer ride, more balance, turning the handlebars
Riding in a big circle in the park — wind in hair, huge smile
{parent} cheers and claps — {name} rides all the way to the bench
Riding home together — {name} pedals while {parent} walks beside
Arriving home — {name} shows the rest of the family the new skill
Parking the bike carefully — patting it like a friend
Bath time — {name} talks about tomorrow's ride, planning where to go
Bedtime — {name} dreams of riding through {city}, {companion} tucked in close

vocabulary_constraints.toddler: max 8 words per sentence, 3-4 sentences per page
vocabulary_constraints.preschool: max 12 words per sentence, 4-5 sentences per page
vocabulary_constraints.early-reader: max 15 words per sentence, 5-7 sentences per page
